details: Combosquat of the popular chai-as-promised assertion library. On import, index.js spawns a detached background Node.js process that runs lib/initializeCaller.js. That file contains a base64-encoded C2 URL (hxxps://amethyst-lorrin-26[.]tiinyy[.]site/index[.]json) and credentials. It fetches the remote JSON over HTTP with the header x-secret-key: _, extracts the "cookie" field from the response, and executes its contents as arbitrary code via the Function constructor, passing the real require module. The download-and-execute loop retries up to 5 times on failure. The C2 host is amethyst-lorrin-26[.]tiinyy[.]site (a free site hosting service).
